chatsubo.name: The Chatsubo
chatsubo.desc: A low bar for professional expatriates; you could drink there for a week and never hear two words in Japanese.

street.name: Ninsei Street
street.desc: Neon and rain on the strip of Ninsei. Holograms flicker over the noodle stalls and the crowd moves like one tired animal under the dead-channel sky.

justice.name: Justice Booth
justice.desc: A cramped booth walled with monitors. A Compu-Judge frowns down from the big screen; a Compu-Lawyer waits on the small one.

ninsei_west.name: Ninsei Street, West
ninsei_west.desc: The strip narrows toward the bay. Pachinko parlors bleed light onto wet asphalt and a noodle vendor works his cart under a sign that died years ago.

cheap_hotel.name: Cheap Hotel
cheap_hotel.desc: A coffin rack of capsule rooms stacked to the ceiling. The clerk behind the cage never looks up. One of these coffins is yours, for now.

donut_world.name: Donut World
donut_world.desc: Fluorescent and sticky. A pair of Chiba cops nurse coffee in the corner booth, watching the door a lot harder than their crullers.

bodyshop.name: The Body Shop
bodyshop.desc: A clinic for new flesh and chrome. Jars line the shelves and the surgeon's smile never wavers.

ninsei_east.name: Ninsei Alley, East
ninsei_east.desc: A canyon of fire escapes and steam, the asphalt slick with runoff. Somewhere above, a window unit drips on the just and the unjust alike.

gentleman_loser.name: The Gentleman Loser
gentleman_loser.desc: The cowboys' bar. Console jockeys and washed-out hustlers trade war stories under a haze of smoke. Nobody asks your real name here.

shins_pawn.name: Shin's Pawn Shop
shins_pawn.desc: Glass cases of dead men's hardware. Shin keeps your Ono-Sendai behind the counter and, by the look of him, a sawn-off under it.

chiba_alley.name: Chiba Alley
chiba_alley.desc: A dripping seam between two towers. Graffiti tags glow faintly where someone sprayed cheap photolume over the brick.

julius_deane.name: Julius Deane's Office
julius_deane.desc: Past a wall of shipping crates, an old man in a wool suit smiles from behind an antique desk. The air smells of ginger and very old money.

house_of_pong.name: House of Pong
house_of_pong.desc: A dim arcade-bar where the machines are older than the patrons. Cigarette burns and spilled beer map the carpet like a city seen from orbit.

crazy_edos.name: Crazy Edo's
crazy_edos.desc: Edo fixes decks, sells gray-market chrome, and asks no questions. Half-gutted cyberspace rigs hang from the ceiling like smoked hams.

asano_computing.name: Asano Computing
asano_computing.desc: A clean-lit storefront of legitimate gear, the kind with warranties and serial numbers. You feel conspicuous just standing in the doorway.

larrys_software.name: Larry's Software
larrys_software.desc: Racks of bootleg ice-breakers and skillsofts behind bulletproof glass. Larry watches you over a paperback, thumbing the page but never turning it.

metro_holografix.name: Metro Holografix
metro_holografix.desc: Lonny Zone's place. Holographic touts shimmer in the doorway, selling stims and simstim dreams to whatever foot traffic the rain washes in.

spaceport.name: Chiba Spaceport
spaceport.desc: The shuttle gantries loom past the chain-link. Orbital flights to Freeside board here — but with no money and no clearance, you're not going off-world tonight.
